name: theatre-unity
description: Agent skills for Theatre — an MCP server running inside the Unity Editor for spatial awareness and programmatic control.

skills.name: theatre-unity
skills.description: Theatre for Unity MCP server tools. Gives AI agents spatial awareness (Stage) and programmatic control (Director) over Unity scenes via Streamable HTTP.

skills.name: unity-api-pitfalls
skills.description: Unity 6 API rules, threading idioms, and gotchas for Theatre editor extensions. Covers deprecated APIs, assembly boundaries, threading, serialization, and domain reload.

skills.name: unity-ui-toolkit
skills.description: Unity 6 UI Toolkit reference for building editor and runtime UI with UXML, USS, and C# bindings.
